query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, sr.id as system_role_id, sr.code as role_code, sr.name as role_name, sr.level
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_system_roles usr ON u.id = usr.userId AND usr.isActive = 1
LEFT JOIN system_roles sr ON usr.roleId = sr.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Abdullah%' OR u.name LIKE '%Alzakari%' OR u.email LIKE '%abdullah%';
